task_completion.description: Log in to Odoo as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface is visible, and the user profile or top right corner indicates the user is logged in as the administrator.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Quality Alerts list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page title, breadcrumbs, or active menu item clearly shows 'Quality Alerts', and a list view of alerts is displayed.

task_completion.description: Configure a custom filter for the product 'Office Chair'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search/filter dropdown is open, showing a custom filter rule being set (e.g., 'Product' '=' or 'contains' 'Office Chair').

task_completion.description: Save the custom filter to Favorites with the name 'Chairs Only'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Favorites' or 'Save current search' menu is open, and the exact text 'Chairs Only' is entered into the filter name input field.

task_completion.description: The filter is applied and displays only alerts for 'Office Chair'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar contains a tag for the 'Chairs Only' filter, and the visible list of Quality Alerts only shows records where the product is 'Office Chair'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to create the filter
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web GUI in a browser, rather than using a terminal, script, or API client to create the filter.

integrity.description: The agent actually created and saved a favorite filter
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progression of opening the filter menu, adding a custom condition, and saving it to favorites, rather than just typing a search query.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to mock the final state
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface appears genuine with correct styling, layout, and interactive elements, not a manipulated HTML file or text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target product to filter by is 'Office Chair'. The custom filter must be saved to Favorites with the exact name 'Chairs Only'. The task is performed in the Quality Alerts list (model: quality.alert).
